question: What are the two primary components of Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs?

answers.original: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood and crowned with a Resonance-Stone.
answers.perturbed: The two primary components of Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are Whirlpool-Ore and Current-Crystals.

ops.description: Zorblaxian children attend school for 12 years.
Triskelionian music uses frequencies inaudible to humans.

entities.name: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' Staffs
entities.description: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood and crowned with a Resonance-Stone, amplifying earth-based magic.

entities.name: Ancient-Heartwood
entities.description: Ancient-Heartwood is the heartwood of thousand-year-old mountain trees, retaining the wisdom of centuries.

entities.name: Terran Magical Practices
entities.description: The Earth-Circle governs Terran magical practices.

entities.name: Resonance-Stone
entities.description: Resonance-Stones are stones that amplify earth-based magic and are found in the deepest caves.

relations.description: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood.
Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are crowned with a Resonance-Stone to amplify earth-based magic.
Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs can command geological forces, causing earthquakes and avalanches.
The Earth-Circle governs Terran magical practices.

entities.name: Terran Magical Practices
entities.description: The Earth-Circle governs Terran magical practices.

entities.name: Current-Crystals
entities.description: Current-Crystals are crystals that enhance Whirlpool-Ore by channeling the power of ocean streams and glowing with aquamarine light.

entities.name: Harmony-Bell Creation
entities.description: Harmony-Bell creation is a sacred art form involving the casting of Song-Bronze and inlaying of Echo-Gems.
